ofm.title: OnlyFans 2026 crackdown is live
ofm.summary: Biometric verification, AI detection tools, and 30-40% revenue drops for violators. DMs still drive 60-70% of income — AI chatbots can't match human emotional connection yet. Most "AI OnlyFans gurus" are selling courses, not running models.

ofm.title: OnlyMonster dominating OFM tech
ofm.summary: Rapidly becoming the go-to management system with advanced AI assistance integrated into OnlyFans workflows — outpaced competitors in Beta without any marketing.

ofm.title: Fanvue raised $22M for AI influencers
ofm.summary: Now doing $100M+ annualized revenue with 17M monthly active users. Platform takes 20% cut. Top AI creators pulling $50K-$100K+/month.

ofm.title: AI girlfriend market exploding
ofm.summary: Projected to hit $11.06B by 2032. Mental health support segment leads at 41% revenue share. Average $120 ARPU annually with 93% monthly retention.

tools.title: OpenClaw 2026.3.x major release
tools.summary: 45 new features, 13 breaking changes, 82 bug fixes. Key additions: secrets system, PDF analysis tool, browser control improvements, safer defaults. Moving from "demo setup" to production-ready.

tools.title: Claude Code worktrees for parallel agents
tools.summary: Now supports worktree isolation — subagents can work in parallel without conflicts. Configure with `isolation: worktree` in agent frontmatter.

tools.title: Latenode MCP integration emerging
tools.summary: Claude can now connect to external business apps via MCP — trigger real actions (update records, send messages, move data) instead of just planning. Visual low-code platforms building around this.

market.title: Puerto Escondido entry window still open
market.summary: 2026 is the last call before infrastructure-driven appreciation closes it. New North American/Canadian flight routes anticipated for 2026. Rental market showing strong fundamentals with year-round occupancy improving.

market.title: Rammed earth construction advancing
market.summary: Earth USA 2026 conference Sept 18-20 in Santa Fe. New prefabricated block methods reduce construction time and cost while maintaining quality. Digital fabrication workflows (Rhino/Grasshopper) now enabling complex geometries.

market.title: Tulum ATV rental competition heating up
market.summary: Multiple competitors active on TripAdvisor. "Tulum ATV Rental" operator claims "no competitors" — likely positioning play. Lagoon Company needs differentiation beyond just vehicles.
